race.comment: JUSTIQUE (12) can bounce back at her third career start. She won dominantly on debut here over 1435m, just fair last time at Sandown Lakeside against better company when kept very safe in betting. Back a notch here, Williams will roll forward from out wide and take catching. MOVE THE TORANA (11) is racing consistently, boxing on well for a narrow fourth at Sandown Lakeside last time out. She'll be strong late. BIRDIE TIME (8) returned from a spell three weeks ago when she was beaten 4.5 lengths into seventh over 1500m at this track. Fitter now for that local debut and she can improve quickly. EASY DUN (9) was okay fresh with improvement to come, each way.
